bridges 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started

Compute summary statistics from a real CNA sample

compute_observed_stats.Rd

Applies the same statistics used in summarise_clone() to an observed data frame so the result can be overlaid on simulation comparison plots.

Usage

compute_observed_stats(data, chromosome, allele, hotspot_pos)

Arguments

data

Data frame with columns cell_id, chr, start/from, end/to, and the allele column.

chromosome

Chromosome to analyse (character, e.g. "7").

allele

Allele column to use ("A", "B", or "CN").

hotspot_pos

1-based bin index of the position of interest.

Value

Named numeric vector of summary statistics, compatible with plot_clonal_comparison(observed_stats = ...).

Details

Accepts both start/end and from/to column names.
